metadata.description: Eric Risco's agent-skills catalog, packaged as six installable Claude Code plugins (core, backend, frontend, content, agents, ops). Each bundle namespaces its skills as /<plugin>:<skill>.

plugins.name: rsc-core
plugins.description: The front door and control plane: init bootstraps a workspace and recommends bundles; harness governs the 01-TOOLS operational layer and the 02-DOCS Karpathy chaos->knowledge engine. Invoked as /rsc-core:init and /rsc-core:harness.

plugins.name: rsc-backend
plugins.description: Backend stack: FastAPI / async Python services, idiomatic Go HTTP services, and engine-level PostgreSQL 16. Invoked as /rsc-backend:fastapi, /rsc-backend:go, /rsc-backend:postgresdb.

plugins.name: rsc-frontend
plugins.description: Frontend and product surface: Next.js 15 App Router, Flutter / Dart 3 apps, and research-first product design with high-converting landing pages. Invoked as /rsc-frontend:nextjs, /rsc-frontend:flutter, /rsc-frontend:design.

plugins.name: rsc-content
plugins.description: Words and narrative: conversion copywriting, brand-grounded PPTX/PDF decks, and course storytelling that makes concepts land. Invoked as /rsc-content:marketing, /rsc-content:presentations, /rsc-content:course-storytelling.

plugins.name: rsc-agents
plugins.description: Build production LLM agents that are model-agnostic by construction: provider adapters, disciplined agent loops, schema-validated tools, RAG, evals, OTel tracing, and MCP servers. Invoked as /rsc-agents:building-agents.

plugins.name: rsc-ops
plugins.description: Ship safely: transversal secure coding (STRIDE + OWASP Top 10 mapped to FastAPI/Go/Next.js) and source-to-live deployment (multi-stage Docker, GitHub Actions, Coolify). Invoked as /rsc-ops:secure-coding, /rsc-ops:deployment.
